positiveInteger.zh-CN: 请输入大于 0 的整数。

modelInvalid.en-US: The model must use the provider/model format.

allFiles.en-US: All files (determined by rule front matter)

deleteMessage.en-US: This will delete the configuration for "{name}".

savedWarnings.en-US: File review configuration saved with warnings: {warnings}

interactiveOnly.zh-CN: 当前模式不支持交互式配置，请使用有 UI 的 Pi 会话。
interactiveOnly.en-US: Interactive configuration is not supported in this mode; use a Pi session with a UI.

tempFileWriteFailed.en-US: Failed to write oversized tool result to temp file, truncated: {message}
